---
name: Documentation Update
about: Propose a correction, addition, or structural change to the docs/ directory.
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: Documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the documentation issue (e.g. outdated API standards, missing architecture diagram).

## Proposed Changes
Describe exactly what markdown files should be updated or created.

## Why is this necessary?
Ensure the documentation accurately matches the implementation state of the project.
